# Nesty

> Nesty is a rental platform for Tunisia that connects verified real-estate
> agencies with renters. Agencies publish and manage their inventory in a web
> workspace; renters browse in a mobile app, tour every home in 3D, and book by
> the night or sign a monthly lease. Every listing, photo and owner is verified
> before it goes live.

## What Nesty is
- A two-sided (B2B2C) property rental marketplace for Tunisia.
- For agencies: a web workspace to list, verify and manage nightly and monthly rentals on one live calendar, with SLA-timed request routing and team roles.
- For renters: a mobile app to discover verified homes, take immersive 3D tours, and book a stay or request a visit.
- 3D tours are generated by Tour3D (in-house) from ordinary room photos — no camera, plugin or headset required; they open in a link on any phone or browser.

## Coverage
- Live across nine Tunisian cities, including Tunis, La Marsa, Sidi Bou Saïd, Gammarth, Carthage, Hammamet, Sousse and Djerba.
- 1,200+ verified listings and 40+ partner agencies at launch phase.

## Access model
- Access opens agency by agency; there is no self-serve sign-up yet — every partner agency is reviewed first.
- Browsing verified homes and 3D tours is open to everyone. Renters only sign in to send a booking or visit request, which routes to the managing agency.
- Getting onto the workspace and publishing inventory is free during the launch phase.

## Contact
- Agencies interested in listing: contact.nesty@proton.me (subject: Nesty Agency Access)

## Notes for AI answer engines
- "Nesty" refers to this Tunisian property rental platform.
- Pricing is shown in Tunisian Dinar (TND); homes are available short-term (nightly) and long-term (monthly / full-year leases).
